description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common loan-servicing / core-banking export up with the lending-portfolio pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers. Load de-identified records only.

value_hints.principal: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.rate_pct: a number like 6.6, not the string '6.6%'

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Your servicing data never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
